items.title: Board-aligned academics
items.description: Structured lesson planning, regular assessments, revision support, and academic monitoring for each stage.

items.title: Parent convenience
items.description: Admissions, contact details, timings, transport, notices, and downloads are visible without unnecessary searching.

items.title: Student development
items.description: Sports, arts, clubs, assemblies, competitions, field trips, and leadership activities support all-round growth.
